caption: A man sits in a studio setting for a podcast, wearing a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT" and a blue and black baseball cap. He has headphones on and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background is white with a repeating logo that includes the word "HUSTLE" and five stars. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "TALK 101 PODCAST" and text on the right that says "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing slightly, with his facial expressions shifting from a neutral, thoughtful look to a wide, open-mouthed smile. He remains seated in the same position throughout the clip, while the camera angle remains static, focusing on his upper body as he interacts with someone off-screen.
